remarks: Chief Financial Officer & Senior Vice President - Finance

non_derivative_transactions.security_title: Common stock, par value $0.01 per share
non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: The reporting owner disposed 44168.0 shares of Common stock, par value $0.01 per share at $8.11 (Code F). [Note 1: In connection with the vesting and settlement of restricted stock units through the issuance of common stock of the Issuer ("Common Stock") pursuant to the Antero Midstream Corporation Long Term Incentive Plan, the Issuer withheld Common Stock that would otherwise have been issued to the Reporting Person to satisfy his tax withholding obligations. The number of shares of Common Stock withheld was determined based on the closing price per share of Common Stock on January 20, 2021.]

footnotes.1: In connection with the vesting and settlement of restricted stock units through the issuance of common stock of the Issuer ("Common Stock") pursuant to the Antero Midstream Corporation Long Term Incentive Plan, the Issuer withheld Common Stock that would otherwise have been issued to the Reporting Person to satisfy his tax withholding obligations. The number of shares of Common Stock withheld was determined based on the closing price per share of Common Stock on January 20, 2021.
footnotes.2: Includes 221,752 shares of Common Stock subject to previously granted restricted stock unit awards that remain subject to vesting.

signatures.signature_name: /s/ Alvyn A. Schopp, as attorney-in-fact for Michael N. Kennedy
